question: Is there any simultaneous heating and cooling fault in any of my AHUs?
How can I compare the weather with electricity consumption?
For RTU air handling units, what are the property names and their associated ALC and MPC endpoints defined in the external references
What are the Supply Air Temperature Sensors and the equipment they belong to?
Which timeseries identifiers correspond to the supply air temperature measurement, supply air flow measurement, and flow setpoint of the AHU supplying air to a space?

For each labeled HVAC zone, list its name and all associated timeseries identifiers for temperature measurements, various setpoint targets (min, max, heating, cooling, occupied and unoccupied), occupancy sensing and command, as well as the VAV unit’s damper position, discharge temperature, and reheat control signals.
best_relaxed_query: SELECT ?zoneEntity ?zoneTempSensorClass ?heatingSetpointClass ?coolingSetpointClass ?occupiedSetpointClass ?commandClass ?damperPart WHERE { ?zoneEntity <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Variable_Air_Volume_Box_With_Reheat> . BIND(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Zone_Air_Temperature_Sensor> AS ?zoneTempSensorClass) BIND(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Zone_Air_Heating_Temperature_Setpoint> AS ?heatingSetpointClass) BIND(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Zone_Air_Cooling_Temperature_Setpoint> AS ?coolingSetpointClass) BIND(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Occupied_Zone_Air_Temperature_Setpoint> AS ?occupiedSetpointClass) BIND(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Command> AS ?commandClass) OPTIONAL { ?damperPart <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Damper> . ?zoneEntity (((<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasPoint> | <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#feeds>) | <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type>) | ^(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#feeds>)) ?damperPart . } }

question: How can I find the temperature control setpoints for the air handling equipment?
What devices are fitted with zone temperature sensors and what are those sensors?

For each HVAC zone in the building, what are the timeseries IDs for the available zone temperature sensor' points, min and max temperature setpoints, temperature setpoints (single, heating/cooling or occupied/unoccupied), occupancy sensors and commands, and any related VAV damper, discharge temperature, and reheat command points?
best_relaxed_query: SELECT ?zone ?zoneTempSensorTSID ?minTempSetpointTSID ?maxTempSetpointTSID ?tempSetpointTSID ?heatingTempSetpointTSID ?coolingTempSetpointTSID ?occupiedTempSetpointTSID ?unoccupiedTempSetpointTSID ?occupancySensorTSID ?occupancyCommandTSID ?vav ?damperTSID ?dischargeTempTSID ?reheatCommandTSID WHERE { ?zone <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#HVAC_Zone> . OPTIONAL { ?zoneTempSensor <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Zone_Temperature_Sensor> .?zoneTempSensor <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?zoneTempSensorTSID . ?zoneTempSensor ((((^(<https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasPoint>) | ^(<http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label>)) | ^(<http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type>)) | <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#feeds>) | <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasPart>) ?zone . } OPTIONAL { ?minTempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Min_Temperature_Setpoint> .?minTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?minTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?minTempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?maxTempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Max_Temperature_Setpoint> .?maxTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?maxTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?maxTempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?tempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Temperature_Setpoint> .?tempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?tempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?tempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?heatingTempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Heating_Temperature_Setpoint> .?heatingTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?heatingTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?heatingTempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?coolingTempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Cooling_Temperature_Setpoint> .?coolingTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?coolingTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?coolingTempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?occupiedTempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Occupied_Temperature_Setpoint> .?occupiedTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?occupiedTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?occupiedTempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?unoccupiedTempSetpoint <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Unoccupied_Temperature_Setpoint> .?unoccupiedTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?unoccupiedTempSetpoint <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?unoccupiedTempSetpointTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?occupancySensor <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Occupancy_Sensor> .?occupancySensor <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?occupancySensor <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?occupancySensorTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?occupancyCommand <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Occupancy_Command> .?occupancyCommand <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#hasLocation> ?zone .?occupancyCommand <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?occupancyCommandTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?vav <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#VAV> .?vav <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#serves> ?zone . OPTIONAL { ?damper <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Damper_Position_Setpoint> .?damper <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#isPointOf> ?vav .?damper <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?damperTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?dischargeTemp <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Discharge_Air_Temperature_Sensor> .?dischargeTemp <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#isPointOf> ?vav .?dischargeTemp <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?dischargeTempTSID . } OPTIONAL { ?reheatCommand <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#Reheat_Command> .?reheatCommand <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#isPointOf> ?vav .?reheatCommand <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#hasTimeseriesId> ?reheatCommandTSID . } } }
